Blood of the Titans Amulet

Once in a while, the unit receives a shield that absorbs 100000 damage of any type for 5 sec. When the shield absorbs damage, the unit restores health to themself, and all allies in a small radius around them equal to the amount of damage absorbed by the shield.

Requirements: 98-100
